lines.speaker: Lesser Fanatic
lines.text: Hello!

lines.speaker: Lesser Fanatic
lines.text: Hello again! Would you like to talk about the Wilderness Achievement Diary? Or would you like to sell me ecumenical keys?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I have another sword?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you?

lines.speaker: Lesser Fanatic
lines.text: I'm Jeffery, the taskmaster for the Wilderness Achievement Diary.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is the Achievement Diary?

lines.speaker: Lesser Fanatic
lines.text: It's a diary that helps you keep track of particular achievements. In the Wilderness it can help you discover some quite useful things. Eventually, with enough exploration, the inhabitants will reward you.

lines.speaker: Lesser Fanatic
lines.text: You can see the list of tasks on the side-panel.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to sell ecumenical keys.

lines.speaker: Lesser Fanatic
lines.text: You should bring them to me, if so. I'm not buying something I can't see you carrying.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have a question about my Achievement diary.

lines.speaker: Lesser Fanatic
lines.text: Well, there are four different Wilderness Swords, which match up with the four levels of difficulty. Each has the same rewards as the previous level and some additional benefits too... which tier of rewards would you like to

lines.speaker: Lesser Fanatic
lines.text: know more about?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me more about the Easy rewards please!

lines.speaker: Lesser Fanatic
lines.text: If you complete all of the easy tasks in the Wilderness, you can speak to Lundail at the Mage Arena every day to receive 40 free runes and you can teleport to either Edgeville or Ardougne from the Wilderness lever.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me more about the Medium rewards please!

lines.speaker: Lesser Fanatic
lines.text: In addition to the easy rewards, Mandrith will give you a 20% discount off entry to the Resource Area, you'll cut Ents faster, you can access a shortcut in the deep Wilderness dungeon. You can also own 4 ecumenical

lines.speaker: Lesser Fanatic
lines.text: keys at once and receive 80 runes a day from Lundail, and you can find loot in the chests at the Rogues' Castle. Finally, you can access the lairs of Callisto, Venenatis and Vet'ion, three fearsome Wilderness

lines.speaker: Lesser Fanatic
lines.text: bosses.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me more about the Hard rewards please!

lines.speaker: Lesser Fanatic
lines.text: In addition to the easy and medium benefits, the sword can teleport you to the Fountain of Rune once per day, you'll get 50% more lava shards when grinding scales and even cheaper access to the Resource Area.

lines.speaker: Lesser Fanatic
lines.text: You can own 5 ecumenical keys, Lundail will give you 120 free runes each day, and you'll get increased loot from the chests at the Rogues' Castle. You can also telegrab Wine of Zamorak from spawns in the

lines.speaker: Lesser Fanatic
lines.text: Wilderness in banknote form, and control which Obelisk you want to travel to. Also, I'll be willing to buy ecumenical keys off you for 61,500 coins each. Finally, you can access the lairs of Artio, Spindel and Calvar'ion,

lines.speaker: Lesser Fanatic
lines.text: three fearsome Wilderness bosses.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me more about the Elite rewards please!

lines.speaker: Lesser Fanatic
lines.text: In addition to the previous tiers of rewards, access to the Resource Area is free and the sword will now give you unlimited teleports to the Fountain of Rune. All dragon bone drops in the Wilderness become noted and

lines.speaker: Lesser Fanatic
lines.text: Lundail will give you 200 free runes per day and the rate at which you catch Dark Crabs is increased.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do I claim the rewards?

lines.speaker: Lesser Fanatic
lines.text: Just complete the tasks in the Wilderness so they're ticked off, then come and speak to me for your rewards.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: About the noted lava dragon bones I receive...

lines.speaker: Lesser Fanatic
lines.text: Ah, you would like to be able to bury them on the spot? Would you like to receive bones in their proper form, rather than as banknotes?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd prefer proper bones rather than banknotes.

lines.speaker: Lesser Fanatic
lines.text: Very well, I have done that for you. Speak with me again if you change your mind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm happy getting the bones as banknotes.

lines.speaker: Lesser Fanatic
lines.text: Very well. Speak with me again if you change your mind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: About the noted lava dragon bones I could receive...

lines.speaker: Lesser Fanatic
lines.text: Ah, you would like to be able to carry lots of them? Banknotes are very convenient for that. Do you want to receive noted lava dragon bones?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to receive noted lava dragon bones! Not big and bulky proper bones!

lines.speaker: Lesser Fanatic
lines.text: Very well, I have done that for you. Speak with me again if you change your mind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm happy getting proper bones rather than banknotes.

lines.speaker: Lesser Fanatic
lines.text: Very well. Speak with me again if you change your mind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Bye!

lines.speaker: Lesser Fanatic
lines.text: See you later.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've completed all of the easy tasks in my Wilderness Achievement Diary!

lines.speaker: Lesser Fanatic
lines.text: I can see that, well done! You'll be wanting your reward then!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please!

lines.speaker: Lesser Fanatic
lines.text: You need at least two inventory spaces, make some space and come back.

lines.speaker: Lesser Fanatic
lines.text: This sword is a symbol of your exploration of the Wilderness. Speak to Lundail at the Mage Arena every day to receive 40 free runes and you can teleport to either Edgeville or Ardougne from the Wilderness lever.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wow, thanks!

lines.speaker: Lesser Fanatic
lines.text: If you ever lose your sword, come back to me to reclaim it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've completed all of the medium tasks in my Wilderness Achievement Diary!

lines.speaker: Lesser Fanatic
lines.text: You need to complete all of the easy tasks too before I can reward you for the more difficult sets.

lines.speaker: Lesser Fanatic
lines.text: I can see that, well done! You'll be wanting your reward then!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please!

lines.speaker: Lesser Fanatic
lines.text: You need at least two inventory spaces, make some space and come back.

lines.speaker: Lesser Fanatic
lines.text: I've upgraded your Wilderness Sword for you. Mandrith will give you a 20% discount off entry to the Resource Area, you'll cut Ents faster, you can access a shortcut in the deep Wilderness dungeon. You'll also

lines.speaker: Lesser Fanatic
lines.text: receive increase rewards from the chests in Rogues' Castle, and you can also now own 4 ecumenical keys and receive 80 runes a day from Lundail.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wow, thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've completed all of the hard tasks in my Wilderness Achievement Diary!

lines.speaker: Lesser Fanatic
lines.text: You need to complete all of the easy and medium tasks too before I can reward you for the more difficult sets.

lines.speaker: Lesser Fanatic
lines.text: I can see that, well done! You'll be wanting your reward then!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please!

lines.speaker: Lesser Fanatic
lines.text: You need at least two inventory spaces, make some space and come back.

lines.speaker: Lesser Fanatic
lines.text: I've upgraded your Wilderness Sword for you. It can now teleport you to the Fountain of Rune once per day, you'll get 50% more lava shards when grinding scales and even cheaper access to the Resource Area.

lines.speaker: Lesser Fanatic
lines.text: You can now own 5 ecumenical keys, and Lundail will give you 120 free runes each day. You can also telegrab Wine of Zamorak from spawns in the Wilderness in banknote form, and control which Obelisk

lines.speaker: Lesser Fanatic
lines.text: you want to travel to. You'll also receive further increased rewards from the chests in Rogues' Castle. Finally, I'll be willing to buy ecumenical keys off you for 61,500 coins each.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wow, thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've completed all of the elite tasks in my Wilderness achievement diary!

lines.speaker: Lesser Fanatic
lines.text: You need to complete all of the easy, medium and hard tasks too before I can reward you for the elite task set.

lines.speaker: Lesser Fanatic
lines.text: I can see that, well done! You've completed all of the tasks in the Wilderness! Here's your reward!

lines.speaker: Lesser Fanatic
lines.text: You need at least two inventory spaces, make some space and come back.

lines.speaker: Lesser Fanatic
lines.text: I've upgraded your Wilderness Sword for you. Access to the Resource Area is now free and the sword will now give you unlimited teleports to the Fountain of Rune. All dragon bone drops in the Wilderness are now

lines.speaker: Lesser Fanatic
lines.text: noted and Lundail will give you 200 free runes per day and the rate at which you catch Dark Crabs has been increased.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wow, thanks!

lines.speaker: Lesser Fanatic
lines.text: Now, would you like to talk about the Wilderness Achievement Diary? Or would you like to sell me ecumenical keys?
